brief_title: Pilot 3D Mammography Reader Study to Assess Breast Cancer Detection in 3D Versus 2D Digital Mammography
official_title: A Multi-reader, Multi-case, Controlled Clinical Trial to Evaluate the Fuji Film 3D Digital Mammography System Used in Conjunction With 2D Digital Mammography in the Detection of Breast Cancer / A Pilot Study
brief_summary: The purpose of this pilot study is to provide credible performance estimate information in order to properly plan, design, and power a larger clinical study.

eligibility.criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Female subjects participating in prior FMSU protocol with known clinical status

Exclusion Criteria:

* Subjects with unkown clinical status
* Subjects not truthed in prior FMSU study

primary_outcomes.description: Breast AUC performance metrics to determine if 3D has improved breast cancer detection rate as compared to 2D.
